name: emem
description: Agent-native, content-addressed, signed Earth memory protocol. 101 materializable bands across Sentinel-1/2, MODIS, Landsat (target), Tessera, NASA POWER, ERA5, CAMS, Open-Meteo Marine, JRC Global Surface Water, Hansen GFC, ESA WorldCover, SoilGrids 2.0, Overture. 101 composition algorithms (carbon MRV, VM0042, EUDR, RUSLE, SoilGrids SOC, IPCC Tier-2 rice CH₄, SDG indicators, parametric insurance, climate-risk). Multimodal-fusion: every algorithm anchored on S1/S2/Landsat consumes the upstream sensor pitch natively (10 m for S1/S2 indices, 30 m Landsat target); the value returned is the real upstream pixel sample. cell64 is a square ~10 m × ~10 m grid at the equator, matching S1/S2 native pitch — two queries 12 m apart land in distinct cells; two within the same cell share the cached 10 m sample (full fidelity).

address_algebra.cell: 64-bit packed icosahedral aperture-7 hex (H3-equivalent geometry, wire-encoded as cell64: 4 BPE bigrams)
address_algebra.tslot: u64 bucket of the Unix timeline at the band's tempo cadence (slot_seconds = 86400 fast / 2592000 medium / 31536000 slow / 3600 ultra_fast / 0 static). Equal across responders.
address_algebra.band: logical channel within a 1792D embedding contract; loaded from content-addressed band manifest

crypto.merkle_tree: binary, blake3 leaves over canonical CBOR, leaves canonically-sorted
